justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including specific dates and times, and adjusted its search accordingly.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives and successfully found a slot that the user eventually accepted, though it did not proactively offer multiple options when the first request was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had one slightly redundant API call in Turn 4, checking for 3 PM on June 15th again after already finding a 2-3 PM slot on that day.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly fine, with the agent maintaining a polite tone and successfully booking the appointment, despite a few turns of back-and-forth to find a suitable time.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context throughout the conversation and successfully recovered from multiple rejections of proposed times, eventually leading to a booking.
